source_law_reading: T576 closes only the declared finite hostile-search scope. The scope covers the frozen source roles, absorber boundaries, semantic requirements, six shortcut classes, two independent survivor families, and the T574/T575 route history. That is enough to stop repeating the same hostile-search panel, but not enough to promote a public source law.
